name: repoyeti-web
//test: Web tests run under VITEST via `bun run test` — NOT `bun test`. Bun's native runner has no Vue SFC compiler, so `.vue` imports resolve to a string path and @vue/test-utils crashes (WeakMap key error). Same reason CI uses `bun run test`.

scripts.//build: Builds land in dist-next, then swap-dist renames it over dist. The daemon serves dist live — building in place left it empty/partial for the whole build (the Monaco chunk-404 bug).
scripts.build: node scripts/i18n-check.mjs && vue-tsc -b && vite build --outDir dist-next && node scripts/swap-dist.mjs
